sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The graph_ssml_mc20.pyx module defines a collection of specialized graph classes tailored for Semi-Supervised Machine Learning (SSML) Monte Carlo 20 (MC20) events within the AnalysisG framework. These classes, including GraphJets, GraphJetsNoNu, GraphDetectorLep, and GraphDetector, all inherit from the generic GraphTemplate. They encapsulate specific C++ graph types, providing a high-performance and Python-friendly interface to detailed graph structures relevant to SSML MC20 analyses.

sect1.title: Specialized Graph Classes
sect1.para: Each class below is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. They all inherit from GraphTemplate, gaining its base functionalities for graph indexing, tree association, and pre-selection management. Their primary role is to wrap a specific C++ graph object, allowing for specialized data access and manipulation.

listitem.para: Introduction: Represents a graph constructed from reconstructed jets in SSML MC20 events.
__cinit__(self): Initializes a new C++ graph_jets object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr.
__dealloc__(self): Deallocates the C++ graph_jets object via self.ptr.
Introduction: Represents a graph constructed from reconstructed jets, excluding neutrinos, in SSML MC20 events.
__cinit__(self): Initializes a new C++ graph_jets_nonu object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr.
__dealloc__(self): Deallocates the C++ graph_jets_nonu object via self.ptr.
Introduction: Represents a graph focusing on detector-level leptons in SSML MC20 events.
__cinit__(self): Initializes a new C++ graph_jets_detector_lep object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr.
__dealloc__(self): Deallocates the C++ graph_jets_detector_lep object via self.ptr.
Introduction: Represents a graph constructed from general detector-level objects in SSML MC20 events.
__cinit__(self): Initializes a new C++ graph_detector object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr.
__dealloc__(self): Deallocates the C++ graph_detector object via self.ptr.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
All classes in this module leverage Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class ...: Declares each class as a Cython extension type.
cdef <cpp_type> *ptr: A C++ pointer to a specific graph type (e.g., graph_jets*, graph_detector*), managed by the Cython class.
from AnalysisG.core.graph_template cimport GraphTemplate: Imports the base GraphTemplate class, from which all these specialized classes inherit.
from AnalysisG.graphs.ssml_mc20.graph_ssml_mc20 cimport *: Imports the C++ graph class declarations from their .pxd file.
